name: Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour with salt, rosemary, oregano, thyme, paprika, and pepper.
2. Dust chicken with seasoned flour and brown in olive oil and butter.
3. Place chicken in a baking dish and add tomatoes, wine, chicken broth, garlic powder, fresh basil, cinnamon, and lemon juice.
4. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until chicken is fork tender and brown.
